message:
feat(e2e): Add performance metrics collection to JSONL reporter

Enhance E2E performance tests to emit structured metrics via the
JSONL reporter for trend analysis and baseline comparisons:

tests/e2e/mobile/performance.spec.ts:
- Add testInfo parameter to performance test functions
- Attach metrics data as JSON attachments with name 'metrics'
- Emit page_load_mobile metric with duration_ms
- Emit memory_usage_mobile metric with memory_bytes breakdown
- Emit decryption_mobile metric with duration_ms

tests/e2e/reporters/jsonl-reporter.ts:
- Add E2eMetrics interface for typed metric payloads
- Add 'metrics' event type to E2eEvent union
- Implement emitMetricsFromAttachments() to extract metrics from test attachments
- Parse JSON attachments named 'metrics' and emit structured events
- Support flexible metric names from attachment or test title fallback
- Handle both string and Buffer attachment bodies
- Silently ignore malformed metrics attachments

This enables CI to collect performance baselines and detect regressions
by analyzing the JSONL output for metrics events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
